name.ja: ブルーアイズ・トゥーン・アルティメットドラゴン

text.en:
"Blue-Eyes Toon Dragon" + 2 Toon monsters
Must be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by shuffling the above cards from your hand, field, and/or GY into the Deck/Extra Deck. Your Toon monsters can attack directly. Once per turn: You can add 1 "Toon" card, or 1 card that mentions a "Toon" card's name, from your GY to your hand. During damage calculation, if your Toon monster is attacked: You can banish it until the end of the Damage Step.
